submission.implementation_notes: HTLC validator variant built on a zero-cost, Cont-style early-termination Validator monad (Plinth.Validator) plus a zero-cost typed decoding DSL (Plinth.Decoder.Named), ported unchanged from the Plinth 1.65.0.0 monadic submission (plinth-cape-submissions#10/#11) onto the frozen plinth-1.64 branch: decode-or-abort steps and boolean guards sequenced into a flat, short-circuiting do-chain that compiles to zero overhead. Walk regions placed between guards double as the decode plan; each ScriptContext/datum/TxInfo field is walked at most once, and values that are merely compared are never structurally decoded (Plinth.Encoded). Source: lib/HTLC/Monadic.hs (+ lib/Plinth/Validator.hs, lib/Plinth/Decoder.hs, lib/Plinth/Decoder/Named.hs, lib/Plinth/Decoder/Named/ScriptContext.hs, lib/Plinth/Encoded.hs) in plinth-cape-submissions @ 1618ee79536fd3a9a8c081acd519f9c9a2c7b2c2 (branch plinth-1.64). Carries the same per-module inliner tuning inline-unconditional-growth=52 as the 1.65.0.0 original.
